meta.title: Ethiopian Orthodox Tewahedo Church — sacred-texts churn worklist
meta.canon: 81 canonical books (46 Old Testament + 35 New Testament)
meta.note: Drives scripts/eotc-grow.mjs. 'sacred texts' in the EOTC tradition is broader than 'Bible' — it spans canon, church-order/canon-law, liturgy, hymnody, calendar/computus, hagiography, royal-sacred history, Marian devotion, and apocryphal/visionary literature. High-value distinctive texts are ordered first so early batches hit the unique material. 'ref' attaches a scripture locus for crossover Evidence; source-only entries fill the corroboration pool.

entries.name: 1 Enoch (Henok)
entries.note: Watchers, Nephilim/giants, forbidden arts, heavenly journeys, cosmic judgment, Son of Man; preserved in full only in Geez.

entries.name: Book of Jubilees (Kufale)
entries.note: Little Genesis; angelic retelling of Genesis-Exodus, 364-day calendar, Watchers, demons, covenant chronology; preserved entire only in Ethiopic.

entries.name: 1 Meqabyan (Ethiopian Maccabees)
entries.note: NOT the Greek/Western Maccabees; martyrdom, righteous resistance, anti-idolatry.

entries.name: 2 Meqabyan (Ethiopian Maccabees)
entries.note: Distinctive Ethiopian material; martyrdom, judgment, kingship, resurrection.

entries.name: 3 Meqabyan (Ethiopian Maccabees)
entries.note: Distinctive Ethiopian Maccabees; resurrection and righteous kingship themes.

entries.name: Ezra Sutuel (Ethiopic Esdras)
entries.note: Apocalyptic restoration, judgment, visionary lament; compare 4 Ezra / 2 Esdras.

entries.name: 2 Ezra (Ethiopic Esdras)
entries.note: Distinctive Esdras material in the Ethiopic OT.

entries.name: Josippon (Joseph ben Gurion / Zena Ayhud)
entries.note: Jewish history / Second Temple context; bridge between Bible, history, and Ethiopian historical imagination.

entries.name: Tegsats (Reproof)
entries.note: Wisdom/admonition text; research under Geez Tegsats/Tegsas.

entries.name: Metshafe Tibeb (Wisdom)
entries.note: Divine Wisdom, immortality, righteousness.

entries.name: Sirach (Wisdom of Joshua son of Sirach / Ecclesiasticus)
entries.note: Wisdom, scribal tradition, fear of God, praise of the ancestors.

entries.name: Prayer of Manasseh
entries.note: Some Ethiopic traditions include it with Chronicles.

entries.name: Ascension of Isaiah
entries.note: Preserved in Ethiopic; heavenly ascent, Beloved/Christ descent, martyrdom of Isaiah, layered heavens.

entries.name: 4 Baruch (Paralipomena of Jeremiah)
entries.note: Exile, hidden temple vessels, resurrection motifs; Jeremiah-Baruch tradition in the Ethiopic OT.

entries.name: 1 Baruch
entries.note: Baruch/Lamentations material associated with Jeremiah in Ethiopic tradition.

entries.name: Rest of the Words of Baruch
entries.note: Ethiopic Baruch tradition; exile and consolation.

entries.name: Apocalypse of the Good Thief / criminal crucified with Jesus
entries.note: Good-thief tradition, descent/afterlife mercy, passion devotion.

entries.name: Miracles of Jesus (Teamre Iyesus)
entries.note: Ethiopic miracle collection; devotional Christology.

entries.name: Sinodos
entries.note: Apostolic constitutions, statutes/canons of the apostles, council canons, theological/pastoral treatises; central for church governance.

entries.name: Didascalia (Ethiopic)
entries.note: Church life and society; related to the Apostolic Constitutions.

entries.name: Didache (Teaching of the Apostles)
entries.note: Two Ways, baptism, Eucharist, prophets; early moral and liturgical instruction.

entries.name: 1 Book of Dominos (Mashafa Kidan / Book of Covenant)
entries.note: Liturgical/ecclesial instruction; Testamentum Domini tradition.

entries.name: 2 Book of Dominos (Mashafa Kidan / Book of Covenant)
entries.note: Same corpus; Books of Covenant, church order.

entries.name: Ethiopic Clement (Qalementos)
entries.note: Apostolic succession, Petrine/Clementine church order; compare Pseudo-Clementine literature.

entries.name: Sirate Tsion (Book of Order)
entries.note: Ecclesial order, liturgical authority, apostolic regulation.

entries.name: Tizaz (Book of Herald)
entries.note: Church command/order material; compare Apostolic Constitutions and Sinodos.

entries.name: Gitsew
entries.note: Obscure church-order text; research in Geez manuscript catalogues.

entries.name: Abtilis (Abthulis)
entries.note: Obscure apostolic/church-order material in EOTC lists.

entries.name: Fetha Negast (Law of the Kings)
entries.note: Legal-theological code; Christian monarchy, ecclesiastical hierarchy, sacraments, civil order.

entries.name: Book of Canon (Mashafa Sinodos discipline)
entries.note: Discipline, law, ecclesial regulation.

entries.name: Qedase (Divine Liturgy / 14 Anaphora)
entries.note: Eucharistic mystery; temple-heaven-earth connection; Anaphoras of the Apostles, St Mary, St Basil, St Gregory.

entries.name: Gebra Hemamat (Acts of the Passion / Holy Week lectionary)
entries.note: Passion chronology, suffering, cosmic redemption.

entries.name: Ghitsacwa (Lectionary)
entries.note: Annual readings; how the Bible is interpreted in worship.

entries.name: Metshafe Teklil (Book of Matrimony)
entries.note: Marriage theology, covenant imagery.

entries.name: Book of Baptism (Mashafa Kristina)
entries.note: Initiation, exorcism, renunciation, rebirth.

entries.name: Book of Ordination (Mashafa Sirat)
entries.note: Priesthood, apostolic succession, hierarchy.

entries.name: Prayer book for the dead (Mashafa Genzat)
entries.note: Afterlife, intercession, communion of saints; preparation of the body of the dead.

entries.name: Prayer book of Incense
entries.note: Temple continuity, priestly offering, angelic worship symbolism.

entries.name: Prayer book of Purification
entries.note: Purity, healing, restoration.

entries.name: Kidan (Covenant hours / Book of Covenant liturgy)
entries.note: Covenantal identity and ecclesial obligations.

entries.name: Deggwa (antiphonary of St Yared)
entries.note: Core Ethiopian chant; theology through sound, seasons, feasts; major Ethiopian antiphonary.

entries.name: Tsome Deggwa (Lenten hymnal)
entries.note: Fasting-season theology, repentance, cosmic sorrow.

entries.name: Meeraf
entries.note: Chant cycles and service structure.

entries.name: Zimare
entries.note: Eucharistic/communion hymnody.

entries.name: Mewasit
entries.note: Funeral/commemorative chant; afterlife theology.

entries.name: Zik
entries.note: Liturgical chant; saint/feast remembrance.

entries.name: Mezmur
entries.note: Devotional song, scriptural chant.

entries.name: Saatat (Book of Hours of Abba Giyorgis)
entries.note: Daily sanctification of time; compare Enoch/Jubilees calendar concerns.

entries.name: Wuddase Maryam (Praises of Mary)
entries.note: Daily Marian praise; central to Ethiopian spirituality.

entries.name: Book of Abushakir (computus)
entries.note: Chronology, feasts, Easter calculation; sacred time.

entries.name: Abu Shaker calendar tradition (Sid son of Batrik)
entries.note: Computus/calendrical tradition.

entries.name: Bahra Hasab (Ethiopian computus / Mark son of Kenbar)
entries.note: Computus tradition; reckoning of sacred time.

entries.name: Leader of the Blind by Demetros (Easter computus)
entries.note: Easter/date calculation; sacred time.

entries.name: Monastery of Debre Bizen calendar mathematics
entries.note: Monastic calendar science linking astronomy, liturgy, cosmology.

entries.name: Kebra Nagast (Glory of Kings)
entries.note: Queen of Sheba/Makeda, Solomon, Menelik, Ark's transfer to Ethiopia, Solomonic kingship; foundational royal-religious identity.

entries.name: First Writing on Zion
entries.note: Zion theology, Ark symbolism, Ethiopian holy place.

entries.name: History of the Kings of Axum
entries.note: Aksum, conversion, Ark tradition, royal legitimacy.

entries.name: History of the Zagwe Kings
entries.note: Dynasty before Solomonic restoration; Lalibela context.

entries.name: Treasure of the Kings
entries.note: Royal ideology; possibly Kebra-Nagast-adjacent themes.

entries.name: Honor of the Kings
entries.note: Kingship theology.

entries.name: The True Faith of Zera Yacob (Mashafa Berhan)
entries.note: Royal theology, orthodoxy, Ethiopian reform, anti-heresy.

entries.name: Chronicle of George son of Amid (al-Makin)
entries.note: Christian universal history; compare Syriac/Arabic chronicle traditions.

entries.name: History of Alexander (Alexander Romance, Ethiopic)
entries.note: Apocalyptic kingship, Gog/Magog.

entries.name: Tefut
entries.note: Obscure historical text; research in manuscript catalogues.

entries.name: Gadl of Tekle Haymanot
entries.note: Foundational Ethiopian saint; monastic authority, miracles, anti-pagan mission.

entries.name: Gadl of Lalibela
entries.note: Saintly kingship, rock-hewn churches, New Jerusalem imagery.

entries.name: Synaxarium (Senkessar)
entries.note: Daily saints and feasts; major translated/adapted Ethiopian corpus.

entries.name: Acts and Miracles of St George
entries.note: Martyrdom, dragon/evil symbolism, warrior-saint devotion.

entries.name: Metshafe Menekosat (Book of Monks)
entries.note: Asceticism, angelic life, fasting, spiritual warfare.

entries.name: Gadl / saints' lives (general)
entries.note: Ethiopian holiness map: monks, martyrs, miracle-workers, sacred landscapes.

entries.name: Gadla Samaetat (Acts of the Martyrs)
entries.note: Martyr acts; suffering and witness.

entries.name: Works of the Brothers, Part II
entries.note: Obscure hagiographical text; research in Geez catalogues.

entries.name: Miracles of St Mary (Taamra Maryam)
entries.note: Mary as intercessor, miracle theology, protection; named among EOTC apocryphal writings.

entries.name: Marian Anaphora and homilies
entries.note: Marian Eucharistic prayers; powerful Ethiopian Marian devotion.

entries.name: Haymanote Abew (Faith of the Fathers)
entries.note: Patristic doctrine, Oriental Orthodox faith; EOTC Christology and anti-Chalcedonian identity.

entries.name: Works of St Cyril of Alexandria (Qerlos)
entries.note: Miaphysite/Christological foundation; key to Tewahedo = unity of Christ's nature.

entries.name: John Chrysostom on Hebrews
entries.note: Heavenly priesthood, liturgy, sacrifice; Hebrews-temple-Ark mapping.

entries.name: John Chrysostom pastoral works
entries.note: Church ethics, clergy, preaching.

entries.name: Severus of Antioch / Severian tradition
entries.note: Non-Chalcedonian theology, divine nature, Christology.

entries.name: Hilawe Melekot (Existence of God)
entries.note: Philosophical theology; arguments for God's existence.

entries.name: Mashafa Hawi (Ethiopic compendium)
entries.note: Doctrine concerning God; research under Geez Hawi.

entries.name: Mashafa Mestir (Book of Mystery) by Abba Giyorgis
entries.note: Mysteries, sacraments, anti-heresy, Christology; a key lens into indigenous Ethiopian theology.

entries.name: Jacob of Elbaredia (Jacob Baradaeus) documentary book
entries.note: Jacobite/Oriental Orthodox tradition.

entries.name: Five Pillars of the Sacraments (Amestu Aemade Mestir)
entries.note: Baptism, Eucharist, priesthood, matrimony, repentance/anointing.

entries.name: Fewse Menfesawi (Spiritual Medicine)
entries.note: Sin, healing, spiritual diagnosis, remedies.

entries.name: Tikbe Kahenat (exegesis on the meeting of clergy)
entries.note: Priesthood, councils, ecclesial discipline.

entries.name: Books on preaching (homiliaries)
entries.note: Applied theology and popular interpretation.

entries.name: Angare Felasfa (Sayings of the Philosophers)
entries.note: Philosophical sayings; bridge between Ethiopian Christian wisdom and ancient philosophy.

entries.name: Wogris the Wise
entries.note: Obscure wisdom/philosophy; research in Geez catalogues.

entries.name: Zera Yacob of Aksum thoughts (Hatata tradition)
entries.note: Ethiopian rational theology and moral reflection.

entries.name: Aximaros (Hexaemeron)
entries.note: Cosmology, natural philosophy, six-days creation commentary.

entries.name: Physiologus (Fisalgos) on animals
entries.note: Animal symbolism, moralized nature, Christian cosmology.

entries.name: Customs and traditions of Ethiopia
entries.note: Ritual culture, social memory, inherited practice.
